`loans.customer_id` is a required foreign key to `CUSTOMERS.CUSTOMER_ID`, so each loan is associated with a borrower in `customers`. The relationship summary also states `customers → loans` is one-to-many, meaning one customer can have multiple loans.

`LOANS.CUSTOMER_ID -> CUSTOMERS.CUSTOMER_ID`
and
`LOANS.ACCOUNT_ID -> ACCOUNTS.ACCOUNT_ID` (optional).
